fields.summary: Allow disabling app submission from REST endpoints

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description: Introduce a configuration which allows disabling /apps/new-application and /apps POST endpoints.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

comments.body: [~jhung] Shall we disable all REST endpoints that update/change cluster states (e.g. updateSchedulerConfiguration) ?

Thanks [~haibochen], not sure that is within scope of this jira, we just want to address app submission here. For some stuff like updating node labels, we probably don't want a single config controlling whether app submission REST and update node label REST are enabled/disabled
